themes.label: AI Infrastructure Hardware
themes.narrative: The street is rotating out of AI hardware after a historic run. AVGO -22% in one month, NVDA -8.9% — consensus says 'crowded trade, priced for perfection, rotate to defensives.'
themes.data: AVGO revenue growing 38.7% YoY, $26.9B FCF, 67.8% gross margin, RSI 44.7 at -24.5% from peak. Insiders bought at these levels. NVDA revenue growing 61.4% YoY, $102.6B FCF, RSI 42. Both are cash machines at cyclical troughs, not deteriorating businesses.
themes.counter_read: This is multiple compression, not fundamental breakdown. The market is applying 2022-style fear to 2026-level economics. AVGO with 42% FCF margin selling at a 22% haircut is the data-price divergence the entry framework is built for. Watch Q3 FY2026 earnings (Sep 2026).

themes.label: Nuclear / SMR — Signal vs. Speculation
themes.narrative: Nuclear names are selling off as SMR timelines slip and uranium speculation cools. CCJ -14%, SMR -21%, OKLO -21%, URA -13% in one month.
themes.data: Active nuclear permitting: Applied Atomics licensed mPower SMR, DOE awarded $900M to Centrus. AI power crisis is live with 3 active headlines naming ETN, VST, CEG, NXT as beneficiaries. BWXT at -18.6% from high with $8.65B contracted backlog (2.3x annual revenue) already signed.
themes.counter_read: The selloff is indiscriminate — selling BWXT (legally mandated naval nuclear, contracted backlog) alongside pure SMR speculation is the mispricing. BWXT's backlog doesn't need permitting to convert. Golden Dome initiative is naming BWXT and KTOS as suppliers — primary demand catalyst, not narrative.

themes.label: Defense Tech / Unmanned Systems
themes.narrative: Defense spending peaked. Golden Dome is political theatre. KTOS at -60% from 52-week high.
themes.data: KTOS named as 'major supplier' for Golden Dome in active headlines. Defense-tech venture funding surpassed 2025's full-year record after just five months of 2026. SpaceX IPO narrative pulling institutional attention to space/defense adjacency (RKLB, KTOS, ASTS).
themes.counter_read: KTOS is priced as if the unmanned systems buildout is fiction. The Golden Dome headline is a direct product demand signal. Public market pricing has not caught up to the VC cycle data. RSI 48.2 and -60% from high is the setup.

themes.label: Payments / Financial Infrastructure
themes.narrative: Financial rails are defensive compounders with pricing power in a risk-on market.
themes.data: MA +13% in one month. HY OAS 2.74% (near multi-year lows), credit spreads contained. Payments networks grow through rate cycles.
themes.counter_read: Narrative and data agree. MA performing as expected for the macro environment. Hold with existing conviction.

themes.label: Broad Market — Late Bull Extension
themes.narrative: Risk is low. VIX 15.56. SPY +15.6% over 3 months, QQQ +25.25%. The market is confident.
themes.data: Cycle scenario: Late Bull / Expansion — bull 42%, correction 42%, bear 16%. Confirmation score 93 but strategy posture is defensive_review. Real 10Y yield 2.25% competes with equity risk premium. 2s10s curve +0.35.
themes.counter_read: The 42/42 bull-correction split is the key signal. Not a bear call, but the probability mass has shifted. VIX 15.56 means downside protection is cheap. Posture: hold winners, don't chase new highs, keep dry powder for AI hardware pullbacks already in progress.

strategyPosture: Hold core winners. Add to AI infrastructure hardware (AVGO, NVDA) at current trough pricing where fundamentals are running ahead of price. Keep BWXT and KTOS on active research watch — Golden Dome and nuclear permitting are live catalysts.
whereWaveBuilds: The next move most likely materializes in AI infrastructure hardware as Q3 FY2026 earnings approach (AVGO Sep 2026, NVDA Aug 2026) and guidance is raised above consensus. Second probability: nuclear/defense if Golden Dome contracts are named and BWXT backlog conversion continues.
watchFor: AVGO Q3 FY2026 guidance (Sep 2026) — AI revenue above 200% growth rate would force narrative to catch up to data
VIX break above 20 — creates the flush entry on QQQ laggards (AVGO, NVDA, PLTR)
KTOS Golden Dome contract award — named as 'major supplier,' confirmation is the primary catalyst
HY OAS spread expansion above 350bps — would change the credit picture and signal broad risk-off
BWXT Q2 2026 earnings (Aug) — backlog-to-revenue conversion above 60% confirms the thesis
